burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; syncope and sudden death risk in high-grade block
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate; higher in untreated high-grade block

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ECG showing PR prolongation, dropped beats, or complete AV dissociation

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ECG widely available; Holter for intermittent block
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Permanent pacemaker for Mobitz II or complete AV block; medication review
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Uneven pacemaker access in remote regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SUS provides pacemaker implantation in referral centers
